channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over Hanging Tree Inside Winchester Apartments - at 30 William Road -, 15th May
item.description:
We are the main contractor (Elliott Group) currently undertaking construction works at 35–37 William Road and are facing significant issues with site deliveries due to the excessive overgrowth and low-hanging branches of the tree located along the main road. The tree has become severely overgrown and is now obstructing access for articulated lorries and other large delivery vehicles attempting to reach the site. Branches are regularly being struck and caught by passing vehicles, causing major difficulties for deliveries and creating an increasingly serious safety risk for drivers, pedestrians, and other road users. At present, vehicles are struggling to pass safely beneath the canopy, and there is a genuine concern that continued access could result in damage to vehicles or potentially lead to an accident if the issue is not addressed urgently. From reviewing your website, it appears the tree was last inspected in March 2025. However, given its current condition, we would be grateful if this could now be treated as a priority matter. Could someone please attend site as soon as possible to inspect the tree and arrange for the necessary pruning works to be carried out urgently. Many thanks Anita
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, William Road, Fitzrovia, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large bag containing various rubbish including broken glass., 15th May
item.description:
Dumped this afternoon at some point

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Mead, Welling, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 15th May
item.description:
The car was noticed badly parked on 08.45 Thursday 14th May 2026. The car does not have a valid MOT and it is damaged at the front.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Duncroft, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping blocking the back of Hevelius close., 15th May
item.description:
Number 13 have dumped rubbish in the alley behind the house. This has now blocked the bath and access to get out in case of an emergency.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hevelius Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping hotspot, 15th May
item.description:
Flytipping and general rubbish has been left on this verge with no sign of it being cleaned up, also rubbish to be picked up near Scott house . Although ALOT of it is on the side of the dual carriageway, it is still the responsibility of the council to clean up the green verges on the pavement side.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stockton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags obstruction pavement outside 23/25 Grosvenor Terrace, 15th May
item.description:
Black bags obstruction pavement outside 23/25 Grosvenor Terrace

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillingdon Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signage has been left here as garbage, 15th May
item.description:
There used to be a welcome to Angel Edmonton sign here which has now come off, leaving a blank sign face. This is no longer here and should be replaced. The signage on the grass verge has been left here, not picked up by the relevant authorities causing an eyesore

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stockton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Barriers, equipment or materials left on the highway

item.title: Flytipping hotspot- for more than 5 years, 15th May
item.description:
The council have been notified about this flytipping hotspot for many years, the weeds have overgrown and people come here to throw their rubbish then never gets picked up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stockton Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rull rubbish bin and large box of rubbish. dog fouling, 15th May
item.description:
Rull rubbish bin with blue lid has been there for about 8 weeks. now a large box of dumped rubbish has been added to it. also, dog fouling by the bike shed under flats not being cleared. smells disgusting.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole 6ft x 4ft, 15th May
item.description:
Large pothole for over a month Busy Road The whole house shakes when heavy vehicles drive in it!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Firside Grove, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned motor bike, 15th May
item.description:
This motor bike has been abandoned on the grounds of the University of Greenwich. It does not belong to a student or a member of staff and has not been moved for a few months.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): King William Walk, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 15th May
item.description:
There is litter on the pavement around Scopes Clothes recycling bin on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

item.title: Sofa left on pavement, 15th May
